overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a dark coastal shipwreck area at night. The character navigates around wooden wreckage and rocky terrain under an overcast night sky with atmospheric blue lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal shipwreck area with wooden pier remains

events.description: character turns around and begins walking forward away from starting position

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns and walks away from wooden pier structure toward shipwreck remains along the coast

entered.detail: weathered wooden dock extending into water with support beams
large stone cliff formation with jagged edges
scattered wooden planks and broken ship parts on shore
stacked wooden barrels near the path
large curved wooden ship hull partially buried in ground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with Geralt standing near a wooden pier structure on a rocky coast at night. He turns and begins walking toward a shipwreck, passing wooden barrels and rocky outcrops under an overcast sky.

agents.ego_description: walking through grassy clearing with scattered rocks, heading toward narrow path between formations

entered.detail: open area with green grass and scattered wildflowers
tall jagged rock outcrop with mossy surfaces
dark silhouette of pine trees on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through an open grassy area dotted with rocks, leaving the wooden pier behind. The terrain transitions to a narrower path flanked by large rock formations with a distant forest visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path alongside large shipwreck remains

events.description: path narrows and large shipwreck hull becomes prominent on right side

agents.ego_description: navigating narrow path beside large shipwreck hull with broken wooden mast

entered.detail: massive wooden ship hull with ribbed interior structure
broken wooden mast leaning across the path
steep vertical rock face forming canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as Geralt walks alongside the massive hull of a shipwreck on his right. Wooden masts and debris litter the area as he navigates between the wreckage and rocky walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky valley path leading to distant settlement

events.description: distant village lights become visible on the horizon, adding subtle illumination to the scene

agents.ego_description: walking through rocky valley toward distant settlement lights visible on the horizon

entered.detail: warm yellow lights from buildings visible in the far distance
dense line of pine trees marking the valley edge
tall evergreen trees with dark silhouettes

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the shipwreck area into a wider rocky valley. Distant lights from a settlement become visible on the horizon as he continues along the path, with pine trees lining the left side and rock formations on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a cluttered coastal pier toward a more open, rugged wilderness under a dark night sky. It begins with Geralt standing by a wooden pier structure on a rocky coast, turning to walk past scattered wooden barrels and jagged outcrops. As he moves away from the pier, the environment opens into a grassy expanse dotted with rocks. The scene then shifts as the terrain narrows into a path flanked by towering rock formations, finally revealing a distant forest on the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic corridor of wreckage into a wide, open rocky valley. It begins with Geralt navigating a narrow path alongside the massive hull of a shipwreck, moving past towering wooden masts and scattered debris hemmed in by rocky walls. As he pushes forward, the oppressive wreckage gives way to a more expansive landscape where the terrain opens up into a valley. The scene then expands to reveal pine trees lining the left side and jagged rock formations on the right, while distant lights from a settlement emerge on the horizon.
